steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: The text describes the resurfacing machine's process in sequence: "first scraped... ______ sprayed water... Lastly, it smoothed." The blank introduces the second of three sequential steps.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
Next is the standard sequencer for the second step in a process — exactly fitting between "first" and "lastly." For example introduces an instance, Similarly draws a parallel, and In contrast signals contrast — none signals sequence.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
